name: Separation of Liability Election

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must be divorced, legally separated, or not living in the same household as the former spouse for the 12 months preceding the election.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a taxpayer to limit their liability for a joint tax deficiency by allocating the deficiency between themselves and their former or separated spouse as if they had filed separate returns.
